flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Stanford University fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (77.2% → 50.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Stanford University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.2k → $65.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Stanford University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.0k → $38.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Stanford University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).
